heroText: A place to seek God together at the University of Kentucky — a campus ministry and Christian living community for students who want to grow in faith, friendship, and purpose.
introTitle: A Place to Seek God Together
introText: We are a community of people trying to follow Jesus on our campus, in our city, and around the world. The Wesley is UK’s Christian ministry with a residential community — a place to live, worship, pray, serve, and belong.
